name: self_test
desc: Run the self-test checklist. Returns pass/fail summary. Use to verify tools and commands work. Optionally filter by section or test_id.

parameters.name: test_id
parameters.description: Run a single test by ID (e.g., '2.1')

parameters.name: mcp_debug_script
parameters.description: Run MCP UI debug JSON from BUILD MEP Plan/AIChat/MCP Debug Tests/ (e.g. 01_startup.json). Overrides section/test_id when set.
